ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the client */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the client (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the client (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the client */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the financial advisor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the financial advisor */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the financial advisor */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the financial advisor (e.g., CFP, CFA) */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the financial advisor (e.g., retirement planning, investment management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is listed */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the asset is listed (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the transaction */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial advisor who assisted with the transaction */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being transacted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the transaction (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset being transacted */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset at the time of transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "premium" REAL /* Premium associated with the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES financial_advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the portfolio */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the asset was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the asset in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, Euro, Japanese Yen) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the investment */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio where the investment was made */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being invested */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment that generated the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was generated */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount of the return */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (e.g., dividend, interest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that incurred the fee */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., management fee, trading fee) */,
  "fee_description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premiums" (
  "premium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that incurred the premium */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of the premium */,
  "premium_type" TEXT /* Type of premium (e.g., insurance premium, interest premium) */,
  "premium_description" TEXT /* Description of the premium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premiums_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data point */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset at the market data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the asset at the market data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, advisor, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_permissions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)
